category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts PostScript and PDF files to editable vector graphics; official README describes translating PostScript graphics into vector formats.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pstoedit; official README title and website use pstoedit.
docs_sources: Official website is linked from the repository as the project website; official README points to pstoedit.htm as the manual page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/woglu/pstoedit; per instruction, repo not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify PostScript/PDF to vector-format conversion.
